package rulecoverage

func NegativeRaceOnSharedMap() string {
    ruleID := "race_on_shared_map"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "map reads/writes from multiple goroutines without mutex or `sync.Map` protection (detect goroutine launches + shared map access patterns)"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
